task: Kill Zulrah 150 times.

name: Facing Jad Head-on II

name: Perfect Olm (Trio)

name: Stop Right There!

name: Nex Survivors

task: Kill Nex without anyone taking damage from any Ice special attack.

task: Kill Nex without anyone being hit by the Smoke Dash special attack.

task: Kill Nex with three or less players at the start of the fight.

task: Kill Nex without anyone being hit by the Shadow Smash attack.

task: Kill Nex with two or less players at the start of the fight.

task: Kill Nex whilst a player is coughing.

name: Perfect Nex
task: Kill Nex whilst completing the requirements for "There is no escape", "Shadows move", "A siphon will solve this", and "Contain this!"

name: Insanity
task: Complete 'Perfect Wardens' at expert or above.

name: Tomb Explorer
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut once.

name: Hardcore Raiders

name: Hardcore Tombs
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut solo without dying.

name: Helpful spirit who?
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut without using any supplies from the Helpful Spirit and without anyone dying. Honey locusts are included in this restriction.

name: Dropped the ball
task: Defeat Akkha without dropping any materialising orbs and without dying yourself.

name: No skipping allowed
task: Defeat Ba-Ba after only attacking the non-weakened boulders in the rolling boulder phase, without dying yourself. The Boulderdash invocation must be activated.

name: Down Do Specs
task: Defeat the Wardens after staggering the boss a maximum of twice during phase two, without dying yourself.

name: Perfect Het
task: Complete the Het room without taking any damage from the light beam and orbs. You must destroy the core after one exposure.

name: Perfect Apmeken
task: Complete the Apmeken room in a group of two or more, without anyone allowing any dangers to trigger, standing in venom or being hit by a volatile baboon. You must complete this room in less than three minutes.

name: Perfect Crondis
task: Complete the Crondis room without letting a crocodile get to the tree, without anyone losing water from their container and in under one minute.

name: I'm in a rush
task: Defeat Ba-Ba after destroying four or fewer rolling boulders in total without dying yourself.

name: You are not prepared
task: Complete a full Tombs of Amascut raid only using supplies given inside the tomb and without anyone dying.

name: Tomb Looter
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut 25 times.

name: Tombs Speed Runner
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (normal) within 18 mins at any group size.

name: Better get movin'
task: Defeat Elidinis' Warden in phase three of the Wardens fight with 'Aerial Assault', 'Stay vigilant' and 'Insanity' invocations activated and without dying yourself.

name: Chompington
task: Defeat Zebak using only melee attacks and without dying yourself.

name: Perfect Akkha
task: Complete Akkha in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any damage from the following: Akkha's attacks off-prayer, Akkha's special attacks (orbs, memory, detonate), exploding shadow timers, orbs in the enrage phase or attacking Akkha with the wrong style. You must have all Akkha invocations activated.

name: Perfect Ba-Ba
task: Defeat Ba-Ba in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any damage from the following: Ba-Ba's Attacks off-prayer, Ba-Ba's slam, rolling boulders, rubble attack or falling rocks. No sarcophagi may be opened. You must have all Ba-Ba invocations activated.

name: Perfect Zebak
task: Defeat Zebak without anyone taking any damage from: poison, Zebak's basic attacks off-prayer, blood spawns and waves. You also must not push more than two jugs on the roar attack during the fight (you may destroy stationary ones). You must have all Zebak invocations activated.

name: Perfect Scabaras
task: Complete the Scabaras room in less than a minute without anyone taking any damage from puzzles.

name: Perfect Kephri
task: Defeat Kephri in a group of two or more, without anyone taking any damage from the following: egg explosions, Kephri's attacks, Exploding Scarabs, Bodyguards, dung attacks. No eggs may hatch throughout the fight.

name: Perfect Wardens
task: Defeat The Wardens in a group of two or more, without anyone taking avoidable damage from the following: Warden attacks, obelisk attacks, lightning attacks in phase three, skull attack in phase three, Demi god attacks in phase three. You must have all Wardens invocations activated.

task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut 50 times.

task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut in Entry mode (or above) 50 times.

task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (Expert mode) 25 times.

name: Ba-Bananza
task: Defeat Ba-Ba with all Ba-Ba invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.

name: Rockin' around the croc
task: Defeat Zebak with all Zebak invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.

name: Doesn't bug me
task: Defeat Kephri with all Kephri invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.

name: All out of medics
task: Defeat Kephri without letting her heal above 25% after the first down. The 'Medic' invocation must be activated. You must do this without dying yourself.

name: Warden't you believe it
task: Defeat the Wardens with all Wardens invocations activated, at expert level and without dying yourself.

name: But... Damage
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut without anyone in your party wearing or holding any equipment at tier 75 or above.

name: Fancy feet
task: Complete phase three of The Wardens in a group of two or more, using only melee attacks and without dying yourself. The 'Insanity' invocation must be activated.

name: Tombs Speed Runner II
task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (expert) within 20 mins at any group size.

name: Amascut's Remnant

name: Maybe I'm the boss.

task: Complete the Tombs of Amascut (Expert mode) 50 times.

name: Akkhan't Do it
task: Defeat Akkha with all Akkha invocations activated and the path levelled up to at least four, without dying yourself.

name: All Praise Zebak

task: Defeat all three Moons in one run in under 8 minutes.

name: Moons of Peril Speed-Chaser
task: Defeat all three Moons in one run in under 6 minutes.

name: Fat of the Land
task: Defeat 30 Moons of Peril bosses without leaving the dungeon.

name: Sportsmanship
task: Defeat Sol Heredit once.

name: Furball
task: Complete Wave 4 without taking avoidable damage from a Manticore.

name: Denied
task: Complete Wave 7 without the Minotaur ever healing other enemies.

name: Colosseum Grand Champion
task: Defeat Sol Heredit 10 times.

name: I Brought Mine Too
task: Defeat Sol Heredit using only a Spear, Hasta or Halberd.

name: Slow Dancing in the Sand
task: Defeat Sol Heredit without running during the fight with him.

name: Showboating
task: Defeat Sol Heredit after using [[Fortis Salute]] to the north, east, south and west of the arena while he is below 10% hitpoints.

name: Perfect Footwork
task: Defeat Sol Heredit without taking any damage from his Spear, Shield, Grapple or Triple Attack.

name: Reinforcements
task: Defeat Sol Heredit with "Bees II", "Quartet" and "Solarflare II" modifiers active.

name: One-off
task: Complete Wave 11 with either 'Red Flag', 'Dynamic Duo', or 'Doom II' active.

name: I was here first!
task: Kill a Jaguar Warrior using a Claw-type weapon special attack.

name: Colosseum Speed-Chaser
task: Complete the Colosseum with a total time of 28:00 or less.

name: Colosseum Speed-Runner
task: Complete the Colosseum with a total time of 24:00 or less.

name: Rapid Reload
task: Hit three Tormented Demons within 3 seconds using a ballista or a crossbow.

name: Three Times the Thrashing
task: Kill three Tormented Demons within 3 seconds.

name: Through Fire and Flames
task: Kill a Tormented Demon whilst their shield is inactive.

name: Two Times the Torment
task: Kill two Tormented Demons within 2 seconds.

name: Unending Torment
task: Kill a Tormented Demon.

name: Arachnid Lover
task: Kill Araxxor 10 times without leaving.

name: Araxxor Master
task: Kill Araxxor 75 times.

name: Araxxor Veteran
task: Kill Araxxor 25 times.

name: Araxxor Speed-Chaser
task: Kill Araxxor 5 times in 10:00.

name: Relaxxor
task: Kill Araxxor after destroying six eggs.

name: Araxxor Speed-Trialist
task: Kill Araxxor 4 times in 10:00.

name: Araxxor Speed-Runner
task: Kill Araxxor 6 times in 10:00.

name: Perfect Araxxor
task: Kill Araxxor perfectly, without taking damage from Araxxor's Mage & Range attacks, melee attack off prayer, araxyte minions damage, or damage from acid pools.

name: Let it seep in
task: Kill Araxxor without ever having venom or poison immunity.

name: Araxyte Betrayal
task: Have an Araxyte kill three other Araxytes.

name: Perfect Araxxor 2
task: Kill Araxxor perfectly, without hitting it during the enrage phase.

name: Swimming in Venom
task: Kill Araxxor without the boss ever moving.

name: Amoxliatl Adept
task: Kill Amoxliatl 20 times.

name: Amoxliatl Champion
task: Kill Amoxliatl once.

name: Amoxliatl Speed-Chaser
task: Kill Amoxliatl in less than 30 seconds.

name: Amoxliatl Speed-Trialist
task: Kill Amoxliatl in less than 1 minute.

name: Hueycoatl Adept
task: Kill the Hueycoatl 10 times.

name: Hueycoatl Champion
task: Kill the Hueycoatl once.

name: Hueycoatl Speed-Chaser
task: Kill the Hueycoatl in 2:30 with five or fewer players.

name: Hueycoatl Speed-Runner
task: Kill the Hueycoatl in 2:30 with three or fewer players.

name: Hueycoatl Speed-Trialist
task: Kill the Hueycoatl in 2:30

name: Hueycoatl Veteran
task: Kill the Hueycoatl 25 times.

name: I'm your son
task: Kill the Hueycoatl whilst wearing two pieces of Hueycoatl armour.

name: Kemo Makti
task: Kill Amoxliatl 10 times without leaving her chamber.

name: Nagua Negation
task: Kill Amoxliatl without taking any damage.

name: Perfect Hueycoatl
task: Kill the Hueycoatl perfectly 5 times without leaving. To get a perfect kill, you must not take any avoidable damage from the Hueycoatl's lightning attack, tail slam attack or off-prayer projectile attacks.

name: Is it a bird?
task: Kill the Hueycoatl using only dragonbane weaponry.

name: Pillar Lover
task: Kill the Hueycoatl whilst it is vulnerable.

name: Temotli Triumph
task: Kill Amoxliatl using only glacial temotli as a weapon.

name: Totally Shattered
task: Kill Amoxliatl without any of her unstable ice shattering.

name: Without Ralos' Light
task: Kill Amoxliatl without losing any prayer points.

name: One by one
task: Kill one Titan at a time, without attacking the other.

name: Elemental Company
task: Kill the Royal Titans without attacking any elementals.

name: Let them fight
task: Kill the Royal Titans while having the Royal Titans kill a total of 10 elementals.

name: Royal Titan Champion
task: Kill the Royal Titans 10 times.

name: Royal Titan Adept
task: Kill the Royal Titans 25 times.

name: It takes too long
task: Kill both Royal Titans while they are charging up their area attack. Both titans must die during the same charging phase.

name: Perfect Royal Titans
task: Kill the Royal Titans without getting hit by any avoidable damage. This includes: Melee attacks, Explosions from the ice or fire elemental, Icicle or fire spawn damage, and Ice or fire pulse attacks.

name: Royal Titan Speed-Runner
task: Kill the Royal Titans in less than 1:30 minutes.

name: Titan Killer
task: Kill the Royal Titans 15 times without anyone leaving the instance. If a player joins the fight, the current streak will be reset to 0. If a player leaves the fight, the task will be failed and a new instance will need to be created.

name: I need room
task: Kill the Royal Titans while extinguishing all fires and melting all icicles before they dissipate naturally.

name: No time to pray
task: Kill the Royal Titans without losing any prayer points.

name: Back so soon?
task: Defeat Yama without the judge being attacked with the wrong style and without taking more than one instance of damage each time you are exiled from the arena.

name: Contract Choreographer
task: Defeat Yama whilst completing 'Shadow Dancer', 'Fire Fighter', 'Back so soon?' and without taking any other avoidable damage.

name: Contractually Unbound
task: Defeat Yama under the elevated conditions of one of his non-standard contracts.

name: Fire fighter
task: Defeat Yama without getting hit by fire and having only killed void flares with special attacks.

name: No toppings, no drinks, thanks
task: Defeat Yama without anybody healing using anything other than plain pizza and without anybody drinking any potions.

name: Shadow dancer
task: Defeat Yama without getting hit by shadows and without being more than one tile away from the center of his shadow crash attack.

name: Yama Adept
task: Defeat Yama once.

name: Yama Speed-Chaser
task: Defeat Yama in an average time of under 3:00 over your last four kills.

name: Yama Speed-Trialist
task: Defeat Yama in an average time of under 3:38 over your last four kills.

name: Yama Veteran
task: Defeat Yama 50 times.

name: Yama Speed-Runner
task: Defeat Yama in an average time of under 2:34 over your last four kills.

name: Doom Adept
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at delve level 3.

name: Doom Veteran
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at delve level 8.

name: It's Dark Down Here
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at delve level 16.

name: Doom Crawler
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl level 1 in less than 30 seconds.

name: Exposed Doom
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl during its Melee charge phase.

name: Doom Chaser
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 in less than 10:00.

name: Mokhaiotl Drift
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl at level 8 or above before he finishes the first burrow phase.

name: Mine's Better
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 whilst always wearing a shield.

name: Grub Patrol
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without ever letting a grub be absorbed.

name: Doom Racer
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 in less than 7:15.

name: The Praying Mantis
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without restoring your prayer points through any method.

name: Perfect Doom
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without taking any damage from the boss, letting any grubs be absorbed, or stepping in acid blood.

name: Duel of Mokhaiotl
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 whilst only damaging the boss with one-handed melee attacks.

name: Darkness Is Your Ally?
task: Defeat the Doom of Mokhaiotl levels 1-8 without equipping a demonbane weapon.

name: Mopping up
task: Clear at least 8 acid splats in a single Volatile Earth special attack.

name: Shellbane Adept
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon 25 times.

name: Shellbane Veteran
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon 50 times.

name: Perfect Shellbane
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon without taking damage.

name: Dry Cleaning
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon after clearing its corrosive spit from your armour.

name: Shellbane Speedrunner
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon 10 times within 12:30 minutes of entering the cave.

name: Shellbane Survivor
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon 25 times without leaving the cave.

name: Featherweight Fighter
task: Kill the Shellbane Gryphon 5 times without leaving the cave, while wearing gear weighing less than 40kg.

name: Brutus Novice
task: Kill Brutus.

name: Brutus Champion
task: Kill Brutus 10 times.

name: Beef vs Beef
task: Kill Brutus whilst neither equipping nor consuming anything.

name: Smarter than a Cow
task: Kill Brutus without being attacked.

name: Brutus Speed-Trialist
task: Kill Brutus in less than 2 seconds.
